text.title: Storybook Testing and CI Integration
text.summary: Interaction testing with play functions, Chromatic visual regression setup, a11y testing rules, and CI workflow pattern.

rule.statement: Pair every story with at least one play function for its primary interaction. This turns Storybook into a free interaction-test suite runnable by @storybook/test-runner.
For forms, verify both submission success and validation error states with distinct play functions.
Visual regression baselines must be approved by a human the first time. Agents must never accept their own baselines — this defeats the purpose of visual regression.
Set parameters.chromatic.pauseAnimationAtEnd: true for all animated components to produce stable screenshots.
Add @storybook/addon-a11y to all projects. At minimum, enable color-contrast and label rules. Treat a11y violations as build failures.
Use hierarchical title prefixes: Foundation/* for design tokens, Components/* for UI components, Patterns/* for complex patterns, Pages/* for full-page examples.
rule.rationale: Predictable hierarchy makes the sidebar navigable for designers. Random or flat organization makes story discovery impossible without search.

rule.statement: For network-dependent components, use MSW (msw-storybook-addon) instead of mocking inside the component or story. Component network code must not know it is in Storybook.
